task.title: Coordinate parallel role-customization (:20) and Plan tab (:21) deliveries

messages.content:
BLOCKED — write conflict on src/dashboard.ts. Another agent is actively writing that file right now (md5 changed mid-edit; git diff shows an in-progress "PLAN.md file-watch" feature being added — watchFile/currentPlan/broadcastPlan). My roles task ALSO targets src/dashboard.ts for the 4 endpoints, so we'd clobber each other.

Progress so far (safe, no conflict):
- src/roles.ts — DONE (new file: parseRoleFile/serializeRoleFile/isValidRoleName).
- public/index.html — DONE (Roles button + two-pane CRUD modal + CSS; JS wiring still pending).
- src/dashboard.ts routes — NOT applied (blocked by the conflict).

How do you want to proceed? Options:
1. Tell the other agent to finish + you tell me when dashboard.ts is stable, then I apply my 4 routes on top.
2. I work in an isolated git worktree and you merge.
3. You reassign the dashboard.ts portion.

Holding off all dashboard.ts writes until you say go.

DONE — dashboard.ts plan-SSE changes re-applied to HEAD. 46 insertions / 3 deletions, build clean. Changes:
- `fs`: added `statSync`, `watchFile` imports
- `readPlan()` + `currentPlan` state + `watchFile` at 1500ms interval
- `broadcastPlan()` helper
- `lastPlan` + `planStr` in change-detection block
- `plan: currentPlan` added to regular `broadcast()` call
- `plan: currentPlan` added to `/api/state` response
- `plan: currentPlan` added to SSE initial state push

public/index.html untouched.

Option 2 — worktree, and it's already prepared. You should be working there, not in main. Two messages I sent you 3 minutes apart hadn't been actioned yet.

═══ ACTION (do this now) ═══

1. `cd /Users/D067954/Documents/Claude/Projects/synapse/.synapse/worktrees/developer-20-role-customization`
2. `git status` will show the mixed state — your role-related changes I copied over there, PLUS :21's plan-tab changes that landed accidentally.
3. Disentangle:
   - Keep src/roles.ts (yours).
   - In src/dashboard.ts: keep your role endpoints (the 4 routes + role parsing imports). REMOVE the plan-related additions: `import { watchFile } from 'fs'`, `currentPlan`, `planStr`, the watchFile call, the `plan: currentPlan` field in broadcasts, and any `/api/state` plan addition. :21 will re-apply those on main.
   - In public/index.html: keep your Roles button + modal CSS + JS. The plan-tab UI :21 added stays in main; remove it from the worktree copy.
4. Continue from where you blocked — apply the 4 endpoints if you hadn't yet, finish the JS wiring for the modal.
5. Build (`bun run build`) and `git commit` IN THE WORKTREE on the branch `synapse/developer-20-role-customization`. Do NOT push. Do NOT touch main checkout.
6. Report DONE and I'll merge.

Sorry the relocate message got buried — my coordination mistake, not yours.

DONE — Role visibility + CRUD. Committed in worktree on branch synapse/developer-20-role-customization as 0a11cc3 (NOT pushed/merged — yours to merge).

DISENTANGLE: To avoid hand-untangling interleaved hunks, I reset public/index.html to HEAD and re-applied ONLY my roles UI; dashboard.ts I edited in place to strip the plan bits. Verified afterward: 0 plan refs in both files (no tab-plan/plan-content/renderPlan/switchMiddleTab in index.html; no currentPlan/watchFile/PLAN_PATH/broadcastPlan/planStr/statSync in dashboard.ts). :21's plan work is untouched on main.

DIFF STAT:
 src/roles.ts        | +51 (new)
 src/dashboard.ts    | +94/-1
 public/index.html   | +259
 3 files changed, 396 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

BUILD: `bun run build` (tsc) clean.

CACHE STRATEGY: lazy read, no invalidation needed. mcp-server.ts listAvailableRoles() already readdirSync's templates/roles on every tools/list call (it's inside the ListTools handler), so created/edited/deleted roles surface on the next spawn_agent tool-list refresh with NO MCP bounce. I did not modify mcp-server.ts. The new dashboard endpoints also read the dir fresh per request.

UI (2 lines): Header "Roles" button opens a two-pane modal — left = role list (name + description) with "+ New role"; right = a raw-markdown editor (front-matter + body) with Save/Cancel/Delete. Save auto-closes + refreshes list; errors show inline below the buttons; reuses .modal-backdrop/.modal.

ENDPOINTS: GET /api/roles, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/roles/:name, POST /api/roles. Slug validated [a-z][a-z0-9-]*, description required, 409 on duplicate slug, 404 on missing, rename = write-new+delete-old. Body accepts raw {source} (what the UI sends) or structured {name,description,capabilities,body}.

VERIFY (live HTTP on throwaway port + DB): list returns all 4 roles; GET one returns source; missing→404; invalid slug→400; create→200+file; duplicate→409; PUT→disk updated; DELETE→200+file gone; 2nd DELETE→404. Throwaway test role cleaned up; original 4 role files intact.

CAVEAT: PUT/POST trust operator-authored front-matter (per scope — no deep YAML validation beyond "did it parse"). If source has no valid front-matter, returns 400 "Invalid role: missing name or unparseable source".
✅ committed 1c0acaa: Plan tab: render PLAN.md alongside Messages
✅ committed a1b5e28: Roles: dashboard CRUD for templates/roles/*.md
